Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Nov-30-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/ R. Edwards, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. specially appeared for Plaintiff: MGIC Credit Assurance Corporation whose appearance was waived by the Court

Having heard the evidence, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: John Hickey Brokerage as follows:
Principal $28,360.41
Interest $4,458.02
Costs $374.50 for a total of $ 33,192.93

Judgment signed in open court.
